description_long: This serving tray features a rectangular black frame with a white surface, presenting a visually appealing meal arrangement. The tray holds a portion of white rice garnished with herbs, a rectangular dish of creamy soup or curry with visible chunks, a slice of toasted bread, a colorful vegetable medley, a small serving of mashed potatoes with herbs, and a vibrant salad with shredded vegetables. Each food item is neatly separated, suggesting a compartmentalized or sectioned tray design. The tray's surface is smooth and flat, with slightly raised edges to prevent spillage. The overall presentation is clean and organized, suitable for serving a complete meal in a cafeteria, restaurant, or urban outdoor dining setting.
description: A rectangular serving tray with a white surface and black rim, holding rice, soup, bread, vegetables, mashed potatoes, and salad, all neatly arranged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rice mound centered, soup dish in the foreground, bread on the left, and colorful salad and vegetables on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the soup dish on the left, rice and mashed potatoes in the center, and salad running along the front edge.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rice mound in the center, with salad and mashed potatoes on the left, vegetables on the right, and soup and bread at the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with bread in the foreground, soup dish on the right, rice and mashed potatoes in the center, and vegetables on the left.
attribute_rim_design: The rim is slightly raised, approximately 1 cm in height, with a flat, smooth, and moderately thick black border running around the tray's perimeter. No lips, grooves, or decorative elements are present.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface of the tray appears matte with minimal reflectivity, showing no significant glare or highlights. The food items have natural, low-gloss finishes, and the black rim is also matte.
